'''Zelos II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Zelos system/Legends|Zelos system]]. It was aligned with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was an important source of [[Ore/Legends|ores]] for the Imperial war machine.<ref name="PoG2" /> It was also the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Zelosian]]s. The [[Bare Forest]], otherwise known as the Forest of the Walking Dead, was located in the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] at the far north of the northern continent. The planet was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

==Description==
The surface of Zelos II was covered by hills, mountains, and other rough terrain. [[Galleros]] was the planet's primary continent and the only inhabited landmass. The [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] contained the smaller continent [[Bryndas Islands|Bryndas]] and a few scattered islands.

The planet's government was based in the capital city [[Kryndyn]], which also held the majority of the population. It was connected by a roadway and a railway system to five smaller cities. The smaller cities were all located near mines. Ore was transported from the smaller cities to Kryndyn, where it was shipped off-planet on ore freighters.

All four of the planet's moons were visible at night once every 120 days.<ref name="PoG2" />

==History==
[[File:Walking_dead.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Okeefe and Cholakk encounter a walking corpse on Zelos II.]]

After the planet's leaders were killed in an attack on Kryndyn by nocturnal predators, [[General/Legends|general]] [[Galleros Nul]] declared a state of emergency and launched a successful counterattack. He remained in power and claimed Zelos II was neutral in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] did not interfere with his rule, but it secretly established a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] base in the [[Valley of Umbra]].<ref name="PoG2" />

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] a green [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] commando team attempted to destroy a hidden Imperial garrison on that planet, but was ambushed and destroyed, leaving [[Jai Raventhorn]], a former member of the [[Infiltrators/Legends|Alliance Infiltrators]] as the unit's sole survivor. At that same time [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], [[Tru'eb Cholakk]], and [[Dirk Harkness]] were attempting to secure a cache of Imperial weapons, but Dirk was captured in the attempt. Platt and Tru'eb, while trying to track down their partner, happened upon the garrison; the two infiltrated the prison and liberated Dirk and Jai. In the ensuing firefight the Imperial major in command was killed, prompting the executive officer to order a surrender.
